data.summary_suggestion: Update wireless rate plan configuration
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing wireless rate plan identified by its Sid. Allows modification of rate plan properties such as pricing, data limits, or other configuration parameters. Requires the rate plan Sid as a path parameter. Returns the updated rate plan object with all current properties. Changes take effect immediately for new SIM activations.

data.summary_suggestion: Delete wireless rate plan
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a wireless rate plan identified by its Sid. Requires the rate plan Sid as a path parameter. Once deleted, the rate plan cannot be used for new SIM activations.
